title: get api auth callback google success
description: Test the GET /api/auth/callback/google endpoint to verify it correctly handles a successful Google OAuth callback by exchanging the code for a Supabase session and returning a 302 redirect to the dashboard.

title: get api auth handoff code valid
description: Test the GET /api/auth/handoff/[code] endpoint with a valid one-time handoff code to ensure it returns a 302 redirect with the transferred session on the target device.

title: post api auth logout authenticated
description: Test the POST /api/auth/logout endpoint with an authenticated session to verify it signs out the current user, clears session cookies, and returns a 302 redirect to the home page.

title: get api bookings list authenticated
description: Test the GET /api/bookings endpoint with a valid authenticated user session to confirm it returns a 200 response with a list of Booking objects for the user.

title: post api bookings create authenticated
description: Test the POST /api/bookings endpoint with valid booking data and an authenticated session to verify it creates a new booking and returns a 200 response with the created Booking record.

title: post api stripe checkout valid package
description: Test the POST /api/stripe/checkout endpoint with an authenticated session and a valid packageId to ensure it returns a 200 response with a Stripe checkout session URL.

title: post api stripe webhook valid signature
description: Test the POST /api/stripe/webhook endpoint with a verified Stripe event payload and valid signature to confirm it returns a 200 acknowledged response and processes payment fulfillment.

title: post api webhooks daily valid signature
description: Test the POST /api/webhooks/daily endpoint with a valid HMAC-signed Daily.co event payload to verify it returns a 200 response and applies session lifecycle updates.

title: post api cron audit cleanup valid secrets
description: Test the POST /api/cron/audit-cleanup endpoint with valid CRON_SECRET and X-N8N-Secret headers to confirm it returns a 200 response with cleanup statistics.

title: get api n8n workflows admin authenticated
description: Test the GET /api/n8n/workflows endpoint with an authenticated admin session to verify it returns a 200 response with a list of n8n workflows.
